semantic.role: Utility class for constructing lightweight LLM prompts optimized for token-constrained APIs in low-precision 'Lite Mode' structural indexing.
responsibilities: Builds concise prompt strings for high-level file summarization in low-precision structural indexing mode.
Supports configurable response modes (JSON-only or JSON-and-markdown).
Generates localized markdown instructions for specified languages.
Provides a fluent builder API for assembling prompt parts.
outOfScope: Orchestrating LLM API calls or managing token counting.
Handling high-precision or full-context analysis prompts.
Infrastructure-level concerns like network, logging, or configuration management.
invariants: Exports a single public class LitePromptBuilder with a fluent interface.
Exports a type LitePromptResponseMode defining allowed response modes.
Maintains internal state as a private array of string parts.
Generates prompts focused on structural indexing with minimal context overhead.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a lightweight, configurable prompt builder for low-precision structural indexing to reduce token usage in constrained API environments.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Restore LLM-authored markdown generation capabilities within the Lite Mode prompt builder.

English.role: Utility class for constructing lightweight LLM prompts optimized for token-constrained APIs in low-precision 'Lite Mode' structural indexing.
responsibilities: Builds concise prompt strings for high-level file summarization in low-precision structural indexing mode.
Supports configurable response modes (JSON-only or JSON-and-markdown).
Generates localized markdown instructions for specified languages.
Provides a fluent builder API for assembling prompt parts.
outOfScope: Orchestrating LLM API calls or managing token counting.
Handling high-precision or full-context analysis prompts.
Infrastructure-level concerns like network, logging, or configuration management.

exports.name: generateLitePrompt
exports.signature:
generateLitePrompt(
  filePath: string,
  content: string,
  languages: string[] = ['English'],
  responseMode: LitePromptResponseMode = 'json-and-markdown',
)
